title: Cyber Metadata Datasets: ASN, Threat-IOC and De-identified WHOIS
description: Self-built, versioned IP-intelligence datasets behind ipok.dev: an IP prefix-to-ASN database (~1.36M prefixes, MMDB), a threat-IOC prefix reputation database (~28K prefixes, MMDB) and a de-identified WHOIS domain-registration corpus (~1.46M domains, CSV). Each release ships a manifest with per-file row counts and SHA-256 checksums; consecutive releases are diffable at https://ipok.dev/datasets.
